# Activate Tour

Hitting the road this summer.

Activate Tour is back — and London is our first stop.

Join us for a full day of modern marketing content focused on what’s next: smarter strategy, better execution, and meaningful connections with peers who get it.

We’re bringing the energy and insights from Activate Summit on the road — with curated sessions, practical takeaways, and time built in to connect with local marketing leaders.

**June 4, 2026 at Convene 22 Bishopsgate, England, United Kingdom, EC2N 4BQ**

Register Now

## About Activate Events

Activate brings together the marketers, technologists, and business leaders shaping the future of customer engagement. Through inspiring keynotes, customer-led stories, tactical sessions, and curated conversations, Activate is designed to spark new ideas, strengthen connections, and help teams create more meaningful experiences across every touchpoint.

From visionary strategy to practical execution, Activate is where the industry comes together to learn what’s next — and how to turn it into impact.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ActivateSummit-Logo-1-300x32.webp)

The landscape is evolving faster than ever — more data, more decisions, more possibilities. Marketers are stepping into new roles as sensemakers and system designers, shaping how intelligence flows through every message, moment, and experience. At Iterable’s flagship conference, Activate Summit, we explore what it takes to design, execute, and lead intelligent marketing.

![](https://iterable.com/wp-content/uploads/2026/04/ActivateTour-Logo-1-300x40.webp)

Activate Tour brings the energy and connections of Activate to cities around the world. Designed as intimate, high-impact experiences, these events create space for deeper conversations, actionable insights, and meaningful networking with peers, customers, and industry leaders.
